b:T3d2c,<div class="specification">
<p>The following diagram shows part of a circle with centre O and radius 4 cm.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Chord AB has a length of 5 cm and AÔB = <em>θ</em>.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Find the value of <em>θ</em>, giving your answer in radians.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Find the area of the shaded region.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T87a,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em><strong>METHOD 1</strong></em></p>
<p>attempt to use the cosine rule         <em><strong>(M1)</strong></em></p>
<p>cos <em>θ</em> = <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{{{4^2} + {4^2} - {5^2}}}{{2 \times 4 \times 4}}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mrow>
<msup>
<mn>4</mn>
<mn>2</mn>
</msup>
</mrow>
<mo>+</mo>
<mrow>
<msup>
<mn>4</mn>
<mn>2</mn>
</msup>
</mrow>
<mo>−</mo>
<mrow>
<msup>
<mn>5</mn>
<mn>2</mn>
</msup>
</mrow>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mn>2</mn>
<mo>×</mo>
<mn>4</mn>
<mo>×</mo>
<mn>4</mn>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
</math></span> (or equivalent)     <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em>θ</em> = 1.35      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p> </p>
<p><em><strong>METHOD 2</strong></em></p>
<p>attempt to split triangle AOB into two congruent right triangles      <em><strong>(M1)</strong></em></p>
<p>sin<span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\left( {\frac{\theta }{2}} \right) = \frac{{2.5}}{4}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mrow>
<mo>(</mo>
<mrow>
<mfrac>
<mi>θ</mi>
<mn>2</mn>
</mfrac>
</mrow>
<mo>)</mo>
</mrow>
<mo>=</mo>
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mn>2.5</mn>
</mrow>
<mn>4</mn>
</mfrac>
</math></span>      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em>θ</em> = 1.35      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p> </p>
<p><em><strong>[3 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>attempt to find the area of the shaded region     <em><strong> (M1)</strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{1}{2} \times 4 \times 4 \times \left( {2\pi  - 1.35 \ldots } \right)" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mn>2</mn>
</mfrac>
<mo>×</mo>

<mn>4</mn>
<mo>×</mo>
<mrow>

<mn>2</mn>

<mo>−</mo>
<mn>1.35</mn>
<mo>…</mo>
</mrow>
<mo>)</mo>
</mrow>
</math></span>      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p>= 39.5 (cm<sup>2</sup>)      <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[3 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
